TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Kolinda Grabar-Kitarović = Mntucing hngkawas 1968 idas 4 jiyax 29 ka Kolinda Grabar-Kitarović ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Croatia ta sayang o kiya ka Kolinda Grabar-Kitarović, pnaah hngkawas 2015 idas 2 jiyax 19 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Her presidential term ended on 18 February 2020. Papak == Pnyahan pnatas ==
S.PHON: = kolinda gɾabaɾ-kitaɾo*i* = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka kolinda gɾabaɾ-kitaɾo*i* ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan ʦɾoatia ta sajaŋ o kija ka kolinda gɾabaɾ-kitaɾo*i*, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. ħəɾ pɾəsidəntial təɾm əndəd on ** *əbɾuaɾj ****. papak == pnjaħan pnatas ==
S.FORM: = Kolinda Grabar-Kitarović = Mntucing hngkawas 1968 idas 4 jiyax 29 ka Kolinda Grabar-Kitarović ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Croatia ta sayang o kiya ka Kolinda Grabar-Kitarović, pnaah hngkawas 2015 idas 2 jiyax 19 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Her presidential term ended on 18 February 2020. Papak == Pnyahan pnatas ==
S.PHON: = kolinda gɾabaɾ-kitaɾo*i* = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka kolinda gɾabaɾ-kitaɾo*i* ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan ʦɾoatia ta sajaŋ o kija ka kolinda gɾabaɾ-kitaɾo*i*, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. ħəɾ pɾəsidəntial təɾm əndəd on ** *əbɾuaɾj ****. papak == pnjaħan pnatas ==
